blocks.content:
**Three bets to fix this for good.**

Not patches. Foundations.

blocks.alt: Auto-recovery ladder: Level 0 silent auto-fix, Level 1 prompted fix, Level 2 guided rescue, Level 3 checkpoint restart, Level 4 section reset — try the cheapest fix first

blocks.content:
**Bet 1 · Auto-recovery engine** — graduated 0→4 fallback. Builds on the v2.5.0 resilience pipeline (#716, #768). Most recoveries should be silent.

**Bet 2 · E2E testing for guides** — Playwright harness + the `data-test-*` contract (#540, #544). If a guide breaks, CI catches it before users do.

**Bet 3 · Carrot & stick on testids** — repeat the v2.4.2 audit (~100 testids, #711) across the rest of Grafana. Make Pathfinder reward thoughtful selectors and refuse the rest.

blocks.title: Live: Pathfinder + Assistant share the sidebar

blocks.content: **What you'll do.** A 30-second tour showing Pathfinder and the Grafana Assistant working side-by-side in the sidebar — the safe surface alongside Pathfinder's full-screen mode.
Open the **Grafana Assistant** from the toolbar.
The Assistant replies — and Pathfinder is still right next to it.
**What you saw.** Two AI-adjacent surfaces sharing the sidebar without fighting over screen real estate. This is the integration story we want to keep building.
